title: ZeldaCraft
description: A mod based on the Legend Of Zelda franchise by Nintendo, using custom 3D models and features to give the best experience.
body:
Hi, this is my first ever mod so if there are any things you think I should add, any bugs, or glitches just comment them or put them in the Discord. This mod aims to give the player the Legend of Zelda experience but inside of Minecraft adding things like the Master Sword, Hylian Shield, and much more to come. I hope you enjoy the mod! 

Works with both Better Combat and Epic Fight*

*For Epic Fight compatibility for versions below 1.9 you can find the datapack in mod version’s additional files or here for even older versions. Additionally there are currently issues with some custom armor sets rendering when using Epic Fight.

For things like the paraglider and heart/stamina containers use the Paragliders mod.

Master Sword model credit goes to arthur11151 on Reddit.

Wiki: https://github.com/SilverPlayz7/ZeldaCraft/wiki

[![Discord Invite Link](https://i.imgur.com/QHwfBUd.png)](https://discord.gg/WnZuF6CNwS)

[![Link to Curseforge](https://static.wikia.nocookie.net/ftb_gamepedia/images/b/b1/CurseForge_logo.png/revision/latest?cb=20230426033835)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/zelda-craft)
